components.name: DataFrame from Table
components.description: Read a database table and output a DataFrame.

components.name: DataFrame from CSV
components.description: Read a CSV file and output a DataFrame.

components.name: DataFrame from SQL
components.description: Run a SQL query and return results as a DataFrame.

components.name: DataFrame to Table
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a database table (terminal sink).

components.name: DataFrame to CSV
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a CSV file.

components.name: DataFrame to Parquet
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a Parquet file (local, S3, or GCS).

components.name: DataFrame to Excel
components.description: Write a DataFrame to an Excel (.xlsx) file.

components.name: DataFrame to JSON
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a JSON or JSON Lines file.

components.name: Summarize
components.description: Group and aggregate a DataFrame by one or more columns.

components.name: Cross Tab
components.description: Pivot table / cross-tabulation — rotate column values into new column headers.

components.name: Transpose
components.description: Transpose a DataFrame — rows become columns.

components.name: Running Total
components.description: Calculate a running/cumulative total on a column.

components.name: Weighted Average
components.description: Compute a weighted average of a column, optionally grouped.

components.name: DateTime Parser
components.description: Parse, convert, or extract components from datetime columns.

components.name: Regex Parser
components.description: Use regular expressions to extract, match, or replace text in a column.

components.name: Text to Columns
components.description: Split a text column into multiple columns or rows by a delimiter.

components.name: XML Parser
components.description: Parse XML content in a column into separate fields using XPath expressions.

components.name: DataFrame Join
components.description: Join two DataFrame assets on common or specified columns.

components.name: DataFrame Union
components.description: Stack multiple DataFrame assets vertically (like SQL UNION ALL).

components.name: Fuzzy Match
components.description: Find and optionally deduplicate rows with similar string values using fuzzy matching.

components.name: Find Replace
components.description: Look up values in one column against a reference DataFrame and replace with mapped values.

components.name: Append Fields
components.description: Append all columns from a small source DataFrame to every row of a larger DataFrame (broadcast join).

components.name: Data Cleansing
components.description: Fix common data quality issues in string columns of a DataFrame.

components.name: Formula
components.description: Create or update columns using pandas eval expressions.

components.name: Multi-Row Formula
components.description: Apply formulas that reference neighboring rows.

components.name: Imputation
components.description: Fill missing values using various imputation strategies.

components.name: Tile Binning
components.description: Assign records to bins based on a numeric column's value range.

components.name: Unique / Dedup
components.description: Remove or flag duplicate records from a DataFrame.

components.name: Rank
components.description: Rank records by a column, with optional grouping.

components.name: Record ID
components.description: Add a unique sequential identifier to each row.

components.name: ARIMA Forecast
components.description: Fit an ARIMA time series model and generate forecasts.

components.name: ETS Forecast
components.description: Fit an ETS (Exponential Smoothing) model and generate forecasts.

components.name: Time Series Filler
components.description: Fill gaps in a time series by resampling to a regular frequency.

components.name: Linear Regression
components.description: Fit a linear regression model and output predictions and/or model coefficients.

components.name: Logistic Regression
components.description: Fit a logistic regression classifier and output predictions.

components.name: Decision Tree
components.description: Fit a decision tree for classification or regression.

components.name: Random Forest
components.description: Fit a random forest ensemble model for classification or regression.

components.name: K-Means Clustering
components.description: Cluster records using K-means and assign cluster IDs.

components.name: PCA
components.description: Reduce DataFrame dimensionality using Principal Component Analysis.

components.name: Nearest Neighbors
components.description: For each record, find the K nearest neighbors by feature similarity.

components.name: Text Preprocessing
components.description: Clean and normalize text data for NLP tasks.

components.name: Topic Modeling
components.description: Discover topics in a text column using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA).

components.name: Precision Match
components.description: LLM-assisted fuzzy matching to standardize varied string representations to canonical forms.

components.name: Synthetic Data
components.description: Generate synthetic data rows using an LLM based on a schema definition.

components.name: DataFrame to Snowflake
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a Snowflake table.

components.name: DataFrame to BigQuery
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a Google BigQuery table.

components.name: DataFrame to Redshift
components.description: Write a DataFrame to an Amazon Redshift table.

components.name: DataFrame to Databricks
components.description: Write a DataFrame to a Databricks Delta Lake table.

components.name: DataFrame to S3
components.description: Write a DataFrame to Amazon S3 as Parquet, CSV, or JSON.

components.name: DataFrame to ADLS
components.description: Write a DataFrame to Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2.

components.name: DataFrame to GCS
components.description: Write a DataFrame to Google Cloud Storage as Parquet, CSV, or JSON.

components.name: Optimization
components.description: Component for solving linear programming optimization problems.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: Simulation Sampling
components.description: Component for Monte Carlo simulation sampling.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: Geocoder
components.description: Component for geocoding addresses to latitude/longitude coordinates.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: pgvector Reader
components.description: Component for querying a pgvector table for similar vectors.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: Pinecone Reader
components.description: Component for querying a Pinecone vector index.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: Elasticsearch Reader
components.description: Component for searching and querying an Elasticsearch index.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: ChromaDB Reader
components.description: Component for querying a ChromaDB collection.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.name: W&B Reader
components.description: Component for fetching W&B experiment runs and metrics.
components.author: Dagster Community

components.description: Component for executing CQL queries against an Apache Cassandra keyspace.
Component for querying items from an Azure Cosmos DB container.
Component for querying documents from an Apache CouchDB database.
Component for reading items from an AWS DynamoDB table.
Component for reading documents from a Google Cloud Firestore collection.
Component for reading documents from a MongoDB collection.
Component for executing Cypher queries against a Neo4j graph database.
Component for reading keys from a Redis instance.
Reorder, move, and rename columns in a DataFrame.
Automatically optimize DataFrame column dtypes to reduce memory usage.
Count rows in a DataFrame, optionally grouped by one or more columns.
Split a DataFrame into train/test/validation sets.
Filter rows from a DataFrame using a query condition.
Expand a DataFrame by repeating, appending, or cross-joining rows.
Reshape a single column of values into a wide multi-column format.
Apply a formula expression to multiple columns at once.
Sample rows from a DataFrame by count or fraction.
Select, drop, and rename columns in a DataFrame.
Sort a DataFrame by one or more columns.
Write a DataFrame to an Apache Cassandra table using prepared INSERT CQL statements in batches
Write a DataFrame to an Azure Cosmos DB container with upsert or insert mode
Component for writing a DataFrame to an AWS DynamoDB table.
Write a DataFrame to a Google Cloud Firestore collection using batch writes with merge or overwrite support
Component for writing a DataFrame to a MongoDB collection.
Write a DataFrame to Redis as hashes, strings, or list values with optional TTL support
Filter geographic points to those inside (or outside) a bounding box.
Reproject coordinate columns from one CRS to another using pyproj.
Run k-fold cross-validation on a dataset and return per-fold train/test scores.
Calculate geographic distance between two coordinate pairs per row.
Fit a gradient boosting model and output predictions or feature importance.
Compute a lift/gains chart from actual binary labels and predicted probabilities.
Train and evaluate multiple sklearn models side-by-side using cross-validation.
Fit a Naive Bayes classifier and output predictions and/or class probabilities.
Fit a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) neural network for classification or regression.
Balance imbalanced datasets using SMOTE, random oversampling, or ADASYN.
Annotate each row with the GeoJSON polygon region it falls inside.
Reverse geocode lat/lng coordinates to addresses in a DataFrame.
Cluster geographic points using DBSCAN or K-means.
Spatially join a points DataFrame against a regions DataFrame.
Estimate survival functions using Kaplan-Meier or Cox proportional hazards model.
Component for comparing ARIMA and ETS model performance on a time series.
Component for generating time series forecasts using ARIMA or ETS models.
Component for fitting individual time series models per group.
Component for extracting structured data from invoice text using LLMs.
Component for tagging parts of speech in text using spaCy.
Component for LLM-driven schema mapping and transformation.
Component for building word frequency and TF-IDF tables from text.
Component for zero-shot text classification using HuggingFace transformers.
Recursively flatten nested dict columns into dot-notation columns.
Expand an array-valued column so each element becomes its own row.
Extract values from dict/JSON columns using JSONPath expressions.
Pull out fields from nested dict columns using dot-path notation.
Validate each row against a JSON Schema; drop, tag, or raise on validation failures.
Cast DataFrame columns to specified types, handling mixed types common in document database output.
Strip HTML tags from text columns or extract specific elements using BeautifulSoup.
Extract text from a column containing PDF file paths or PDF bytes.
Parse raw email content (RFC 2822 format) from a column into structured fields.
Strip markdown formatting from text columns, converting to plain text or HTML.
Rename or remap column names according to a mapping dictionary, with optional column filtering.
Merge two document DataFrames on a key column, designed for document-style data with nested columns.
Process a DataFrame column row-by-row through any LLM using LiteLLM with parallel threads, fallback routing, and cost tracking.
Extract structured JSON data from text using LiteLLM's JSON mode and expand extracted fields as new DataFrame columns.
Use LiteLLM function/tool calling to invoke structured tool definitions against each DataFrame row and write tool call results as JSON.
Generate images from text prompts in a DataFrame column using LiteLLM, supporting DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, and other image generation models.
Transcribe audio files referenced in a DataFrame column using Whisper via LiteLLM and write transcription text to a new column.
Generate embedding vectors for a text column using LiteLLM with configurable batching, fallback model routing, and optional dimension control.
Extract structured Pydantic models from text using the Instructor library with any OpenAI-compatible LLM, expanding fields as new DataFrame columns.
Run a DSPy program with automatic prompt optimization against a DataFrame column using a signature-based interface.
Evaluate and score LLM outputs against configurable criteria using another LLM as a judge, writing numeric scores and reasoning to new columns.
Detect personally identifiable information (PII) in text columns using Microsoft Presidio.
Detect and redact PII from text columns, replacing entities with type placeholders or custom values.
Detect the language of text in a column and output ISO 639-1 language codes.
Compute semantic or lexical similarity between two text columns or each row against a fixed query string.
Extract keywords and key phrases from a text column using TF-IDF, YAKE, or RAKE.
Assign topic labels to rows using LDA or NMF topic modeling.
Transcribe audio files from a file path column using OpenAI Whisper local model.
Generate captions for images from a file path or URL column using a vision-capable LLM.
Generate SQL queries from natural language questions using an LLM, with optional schema context.
Enrich DataFrame rows with LLM-generated fields by sending row context to an LLM and extracting structured new columns.
Score text pairs using a cross-encoder model for accurate reranking and relevance scoring.
Run a Haystack NLP pipeline against a text column for question answering, summarization, translation, or classification.
Parse free-form address strings into structured components: street, city, state, zip, and country.
Standardize and validate address components to USPS-style format, normalizing abbreviations, casing, and ZIP formatting.
Extract text from images using Tesseract OCR with optional PIL preprocessing.
Classify images using CLIP zero-shot or torchvision pre-trained models, returning top-N labels and confidence scores.
Detect objects in images using HuggingFace DETR models, returning bounding boxes, labels, and confidence scores.
Send images to a vision LLM (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) and extract structured fields as new DataFrame columns.
Analyze the layout of document images to detect regions such as text blocks, tables, figures, and headers.
Score visual similarity between images using CLIP embeddings and cosine similarity.
Detect faces in images and return bounding boxes, face count, and optional landmark positions.
Extract technical metadata from images including dimensions, format, color mode, and EXIF data such as GPS coordinates and camera model.
